name: hidden chamber
hints: A hidden chamber with a stone block. The block may be movable or contain something.
EXAM BLOCK or PUSH BLOCK. Go WEST for another hidden chamber, NORTH to return to the altar room.
The stone block may need to be moved to reveal something underneath. Check WEST for more hidden items.
notes: Hidden chamber in the temple with a stone block. North leads to altar room (room 22), west to another hidden chamber (room 24). The stone block may be part of a puzzle.
